data.title: Retrospective Study to Evaluate the Safety of Sebryl® and / or Sebryl Plus® in the Treatment of Seborrheic Dermatitis and Psoriasis of the Scalp in Routine Medical Practice.
data.brief_summary: Observational, descriptive, retrospective, multicenter study to evaluate the safety of the treatment with Sebryl® and / or Sebryl Plus® in the management of seborrheic dermatitis and psoriasis of the scalp in routine medical practice.
data.eligibility_criteria:
Inclusion Criteria:

* Any sex.
* Treatment with Sebryl® and / or Sebryl Plus® documented, for at least 2 consultations.
* That the patient has been questioned about possible adverse events

Exclusion Criteria:

* That the patient has used some other concomitant treatment for seborrheic dermatitis a
